title: cordia scabrifolia
intro: Cordia scabrifolia, also known as the rough-leafed cordia, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant's leaves and bark have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering benefits such as pain relief, immune system support, and protection against oxidative stress. Cordia scabrifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications and as a dietary supplement.
